attributes.action: Tax and national insurance should be paid by people on benefits
attributes.additional_details: I want you to do this so that people that work hard are not disadvantaged and get less to live on for earning the same amount someone receives on benefits I feel that people believe that it is better to live off benefits than work and people need to be taught that is not the case
attributes.background: I want them to introduce tax and national insurance once their benefits reach their yearly allowance so that someone for example that gets £30.000 a year in benefits is not better off than someone who earns £30.000 a year working

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/753426
